experiments.hypothesis: BTC 4h state-change now has enough evidence to call the 4h expression a bad idea, but not enough to kill the underlying mechanism entirely. The correct research move is to test the same control-change grammar on BTC 1h, where density is materially higher and the handoff from chop to directional movement can be measured more honestly.

experiments.hypothesis: Cycle 90 still allows exactly one continuation-family expression, and TAO 4h remains the only lane where continuation is structurally justified. The failed-breakdown hold entry is retained because it is cleaner than breakout theater and remains the best structural repair the evidence supports. This is the one continuation shot the batch gets.
